Video.summary: Jazzy, Jack and Kade go missing for 24 hours in a secret room.
Video.title: Twins Go Missing

Video.summary: The Fun Squad face crazy imposters in an epic compilation.
Video.title: The Fun Squad vs. Imposters

Video.summary: Rebecca builds a hidden room inside a massive hotel with a waterpark.
Video.title: Secret Room! Waterpark!

Video.summary: Salish wants Nidal as her Valentine, but first, they take on 5 fun tests!
Video.title: Blindfolded Valentine's

Video.summary: The Fun Squad have a 24 hour challenge with the Grinch to have a Yes Day, but only in one color.
Video.title: Grinch Yes Day

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton’s first day in high school is a rollercoaster of surprises all day long.
Video.title: High School Here

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz search for the most talented ninja and attempt a trampoline challenge.
Video.title: Extreme Trampoline Challenge

Video.summary: Collins Key & guest get insane makeovers! Wait to see the hysterical prank on Nidal!
Video.title: Salish Faces Stage Fright

Video.summary: Can Salish transform a house into a 5 star hotel in 5 hours?
Video.title: 5 Star Hotel at Home

Video.summary: Salish and Ferran from the Royalty Family turn 21 for the day and can do whatever they want!
Video.title: Turn 21 for a Day

Video.summary: Can Salish survive 24 hours with the richest, meanest family in the world?
Video.title: Salish vs. World’s Richest Parents

Video.summary: Salish and Payton try to hide from security all night while sneaking on every ride at an empty amusement park.
Video.title: Overnight in Amusement Park

Video.summary: Salish and Jordan compete who can convert their house into the better theme park.
Video.title: I Turned My House into a Waterpark

Image.alt: I Turned My House into a Waterpark
I Turned My House into a Waterpark
I Turned My House into a Waterpark

Video.summary: Jordan goes shopping to surprise Salish with 10 back-to-school gifts in one color, but she can only save one.
Video.title: One Color Gifts

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz must buy everything in one color without going over the budget.
Video.title: One Color Shopping Challenge

Video.summary: Ashton asks his crush to prom with the 10 best way to ask a girl to a dance!
Video.title: Asking My Crush To Prom

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam travel to Las Vegas to open a new Ninja Kidz Action Park location.
Video.title: We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

Image.alt: We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ
We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ
We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

Video.summary: Payton always wanted a sister so she adopts her friend Salish.
Video.title: Adopting Salish Matter

Video.summary: Part 1 of Payton's prom saga.
Video.title: Payton's Prom Part 1

Video.summary: Payton debunks social media myths and then tours a farm where she gets to feed baby animals.
Video.title: Busting Viral Myths

Video.summary: Rebecca’s princesses race to pick the best snow day outfit in five minutes.
Video.title: Princesses' Real Life Dress Challenge

Video.summary: Rebecca and friends tour YouTuber homes while trying to avoid a brutal babysitting penalty.
Video.title: Millionaire Houses Challenge

Video.summary: Rebecca transforms into a cheerleader to support her daughter’s dream in an emotional challenge.
Video.title: Mom Becomes Cheerleader!

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt pull off a 24-hour dream room makeover to surprise Zadie in their new house.
Video.title: Zadie’s Dream Room Makeover

Video.summary: Cheerleaders aged 1 to 18 compete against a strongman to avoid an extreme punishment.
Video.title: Cheer vs. World's Strongest

Video.summary: Rebecca fulfills her childhood dream as Roblox principal facing unique challenges.
Video.title: Became Roblox School Principal

Video.summary: Rebecca learns extreme camouflage to hide from and expose an evil babysitter.
Video.title: Hiding from the Evil Babysitter

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz battle their friend Tommy, who is mind -controlled by the Empress.
Video.title: Rangers Return

Video.summary: A mysterious package arrives at the Ninja Family's front door and when they open it, ghosts pop out.
Video.title: Ghosts In the House

Video.summary: Kade interrogates members of The Rock Squad to expose their biggest secrets.
Video.title: Rock Squad's Biggest Secrets

Video.summary: Kade blind dates 6 girls based only on their outfit.
Video.title: Dress to Impress Challenge

Video.summary: The Fun Squad, Santa, and the Grinch swap morning routines for a hilarious 24-hour challenge.
Video.title: Santa and Grinch Swap

Video.summary: The Fun Squad buy Kyler the biggest birthday gifts they can find online.
Video.title: Buying Giant Birthday Gifts

Video.summary: Jazzy is surprised with a special first dance, including her friend flown in and fun dance challenges.
Video.title: Jazzy’s Homecoming Surprise

Video.summary: Jazzy replaces her twin Jack but he gets jealous.
Video.title: I Replaced My Twin

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish compete in a haunted house and become adults for 24 hours.
Video.title: 24 Hour Chaos

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish transform into 21 year olds and Barbie and Ken for 24 hours.
Video.title: Extreme Makeovers

Video.summary: Bryton sneaks into the Ninja Kidz Action Park on an undercover mission to spy on the best employees!
Video.title: Undercover Boss
